===={{g|Legends Z-A}}====
[[Jacinthe]] mentioned that Leon was an honored guest at [[Hotel Richissime]], and that he provided an insightful lecture to the [[Society of Battle Connoisseurs]]. He is also mentioned by [[Zach]], who had the opprotunity to drive Leon through [[Lumiose City]]. Zach remarks that despite his skill as a driver, he had an unusually difficult time getting Leon to his destination.
